title: ochna mannii
intro: Ochna mannii is a plant species belonging to the family Ochnaceae, commonly known as the Ochna plant. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and roots, which have been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. It has been reported to have health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in treating skin conditions and infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Ochna mannii are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
